BeamEvent.description:
Discrete event proposed by an `EventProposer`.

See module docstring for the official `candidate_patches` / `event_patches`
shape contract — declarative (primary) and imperative (legacy) are both
accepted; the splicer routes them appropriately.

candidate_patches.description: Declarative ({candidate_id, boost|drop_out|reason, …}) is the primary form. Imperative ({op, candidate_id, fields|candidate}) is also supported for run_counterfactual interop.
candidate_patches.title: Candidate Patches

event_patches.description: Declarative ({issue, salience, …}) is the primary form. Imperative ({op:'add'|'remove', event:{event_id,…}}) is also supported for run_counterfactual interop.
event_patches.title: Event Patches

BeamEvent.title: BeamEvent

description:
One node in the scenario tree — root or expanded leaf.

Root has `parent_id=None` and `event=None` — it represents the as_of
state with frozen calibrated params + KG snapshot at cutoff=as_of.

sim_result_ref.description: _workspace/snapshots/results/{scenario_id}.json relative path; stored so frontend can drill down to ScenarioResult on click.
sim_result_ref.title: Sim Result Ref

title: BeamNode
